Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Even if we don't set it, MDS can know this is a restore request by hr_action and we can prioritize it in the mover.

Why define HR_BLOCKING? Will we have other types of flags for hr_flags?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Even if we don't set it, MDS can know this is a restore request by hr_action and we can prioritize it in the mover.
> 
> Why define HR_BLOCKING? Will we have other types of flags for hr_flags?

We only want to add this flag to a restore request this is created when a a released file is opened.

parents.subject: LU-19129 utils: message for lctl-nodemap on non-MGS node

commit.subject: LU-18940 hsm: add HSM_REQ_BLOCKING flag to hsm_request
commit.message:
LU-18940 hsm: add HSM_REQ_BLOCKING flag to hsm_request

Add an HSM request flag to indicate that an action
has been triggered by the kernel and a user process
is currently blocked on this action.

Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0f293b4db1f2fc2a03af537c15e2832cc71d18a6
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59956
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Robert Read <rread@ddn.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
